text_raw: Halt!
text_clean: Halt!

text_raw: The troubles I went to for this witch!
text_clean: The troubles I went to for this witch!

text_raw: How dare you ruin my work?
text_clean: How dare you ruin my work?

text_raw: Impressive... but your end is inevitable.
text_clean: Impressive... but your end is inevitable.

text_raw: Let's see if you can dodge my spear!
text_clean: Let's see if you can dodge my spear!

text_raw: You will not escape me!
text_clean: You will not escape me!

text_raw: None shall lay hand to my spoils!
text_clean: None shall lay hand to my spoils!

text_raw: I would've pierced your heart in a single strike with her power.
text_clean: I would've pierced your heart in a single strike with her power.

text_raw: You have no right to interfere!

text_raw: I'll take the powers of those eastern witches once you're dealt with.
text_clean: I'll take the powers of those eastern witches once you're dealt with.

text_raw: Who are you, barging in?
text_clean: Who are you, barging in?

text_raw: Here after the witch, are you? Not a chance!
text_clean: Here after the witch, are you? Not a chance!

text_raw: I'll drown those witches in your blood!
text_clean: I'll drown those witches in your blood!

text_raw: Soon you'll be begging for your death!

text_raw: Watch out! Behind you!

text_raw: Consider us even.
text_clean: Consider us even.

text_raw: That was too close.

text_raw: A moment later and they'd have taken my powers.
text_clean: A moment later and they'd have taken my powers.

text_raw: Nicely done, I'm in your debt.
